name: Ofelia's School Transportation
principals: Juan I Brioso Principe (Owner); Ofelia N Rubio Grados
districts_or_customers: Likely Collier County area (Naples, FL); no public contract confirmation
recent_news: Florida LLC formed September 29, 2020; remains small single-location operator (no M&A or growth news found)
fit_notes: Sub-scale husband/wife-style micro-operator in Naples FL; too small to be a meaningful tuck-in for Summit (single-digit headcount, ~$378K revenue, ~3-5 yrs old). Pass unless aggregating Collier County micro-fleets.

name: Spanish School Bus LLC
recent_news: Spanish School Bus LLC is the publisher of the 'Spanish School Bus' children's Spanish-language learning app (Chungaboo); residential Cedar Park, TX address; no school-bus operations identified
fit_notes: NOT an operator - this is a children's Spanish-learning app publisher (Chungaboo) using 'School Bus' as a brand. Exclude from target universe.

name: Berkshire Transportation Corp
districts_or_customers: North/Central NJ - Sussex, Warren, Morris, Bergen, Passaic, Hunterdon, Essex counties; facilities in Sparta & Netcong NJ; NJSBCA member
recent_news: NJ School Bus Contractors Association member spotlight (2021); 30+ year independent special-needs transporter; no M&A activity found
fit_notes: Attractive NJ SPED/special-needs niche tuck-in: 35+ year independent in Summit's core NJ footprint, multi-county coverage, founder-President (Jelly) suggests succession opportunity. Small but adjacent to Beacon/STA competitive turf - worth a soft outreach.

name: Rustad Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Kerkhoven MN area schools (West-Central MN); also operates premium motorcoach tours across US/Canada under Rustad Tours brand
recent_news: 77+ year family-owned operation (since 1947); started in school buses, expanded into charter/tours; no M&A activity identified
fit_notes: Multi-generational rural MN family operator with mixed school-bus + motorcoach model. Too small/diversified and outside Summit's typical school-pure contractor profile. Low-priority tuck-in; would require carving school ops from tour business.

name: Hoffman, Carla (CJ's Bus Service Inc)
principals: Carla Hoffman (Vice President); CJ's Bus Service Inc family ownership
districts_or_customers: South Jersey - Salem County area (Elmer/Pittsgrove/Monroeville NJ); local school districts
recent_news: Active small family operator in South Jersey; no M&A or notable news found
fit_notes: Sub-scale South Jersey family operator (5-9 employees, <$1M revenue). Listing name 'Hoffman, Carla' is the VP not the legal entity. In Summit's NJ footprint but too small for a standalone tuck-in; could only matter as part of a Salem County roll-up.
